mapper.insert: insert into batch.secret_version ( tenant_id, secret_ref, secret_name, version_no, secret_status, current_version, rotation_window_start_at, rotation_window_end_at, effective_from_at, effective_to_at, secret_payload, rotation_reason, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{tenantId}, #{secretRef}, #{secretName}, #{versionNo}, #{secretStatus}, #{currentVersion}, #{rotationWindowStartAt}, #{rotationWindowEndAt}, #{effectiveFromAt}, #{effectiveToAt}, #{secretPayloadJson,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb, #{rotationReason}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy}, current_timestamp, current_timestamp )
